languages.title: Taal
languages.subtitle: Kies de taal dy't yn 'e app wurdt brûkt.
languages.noResults: Der binne gjin talen dy't oerienkomme mei jo sykopdracht.

phone.label: Telefoannûmer
phone.noCountries: Gjin lannen oerienkomme mei jo sykopdracht.
phone.countryButton: Lân feroarje, op it stuit %{country} plus %{callingCode}
phone.invalid: Fier in jildich telefoannûmer yn foar it selektearre lân.

auth.onboardingTagline: In persoanlike feiligensbegelieder foar de mominten tusken "It giet goed" en "Ik haw help nedich."
auth.createSubtitle: Kies in oanmeldmetoade om jo feiligensgrafyk te beskermjen.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Wy koene de oanmelding net foltôgje. Kontrolearje jo ferbining en besykje it nochris.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Gebrûk fan in lokale ûntwikkeling sesje. Native Google Sign-In wurket yn in ûntwikkelingsbou.
auth.northStarSubtitle: No ferbine of trochgean en it letter tafoegje.
auth.northStarBody: De VL01 wearable kin feiligensstreamen triggerje mei kranen en lange drukbewegingen.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Jo sêfte feiligensmaat op 'e kaart en yn petearen.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear kin helpe mei thúsmodus, fersoargermodus, needmodus, ekskúsoproppen en stimstipe.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Wurdt brûkt foar de kaart, gefaarsônes, feilige oankomst en SOS kontekst.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving freget om lokaasje sadat fersoargers kinne begripe wêr't help nedich wêze kin. Jo kinne dit letter feroarje yn Ynstellings.
permissions.notificationsBody: Wy brûke allinich notifikaasjes foar feiligensprompts, needupdates en herinnerings dy't jo ynskeakelje.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving brûkt jo lokaasje foar de feiligenskaart, gefaarsônes, fluch dielen en SOS kontekst. Jo kinne dit letter feroarje yn Ynstellings.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving stjoert oanmeldingsherinneringen, needupdates en feiligensprompts dy't jo ynskeakelje. Wy brûke gjin notifikaasjes foar advertinsjes.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving brûkt jo mikrofoan allinich as jo in AI begelieder of feiligensoprop begjinne.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving brûkt Bluetooth om te paren mei NorthStar sieraden, ferbiningstatus te lêzen en feiligensstreamen fan 'e wearable te triggerjen.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving brûkt de kamera allinich as jo kieze om in profylfoto te nimmen of in feiligensôfbylding te dielen.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving hâldt dizze stream beskikber fanút Ynstellings en it dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Kies de begeliedersstim dy't it feilichst fielt om te hearren.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Fiif kranen kinne eskalearje nei SOS en warskôgings foar fersoargers.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Meitsje in sierlike reden om in ûngemaklike situaasje te ferlitten.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Begjin in real-time begelieder oprop as jo stipe nedich binne.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Besykje de feiligensstreamen yn in demo mei lege druk.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Hâld de sieraden yn 'e buert by it scannen.
jewelry.noDevices: Noch gjin NorthStar apparaten yn de buert fûn.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth skennen koe net begjinne. Besykje it nochris.
jewelry.scanFailed: Wy koene gjin sieraden yn de buert fine. Kontrolearje Bluetooth, hâld NorthStar tichtby en besykje it nochris.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth skennen koe net begjinne. Kontrolearje Bluetooth tagong en besykje it nochris.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Tagong ta apparaat yn 'e buert is útskeakele. Tastean Bluetooth tagong yn Ynstellings, besykje dan it nochris.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar duorre te lang om te ferbinen. Ferpleats it tichterby en besykje it nochris.
jewelry.connectFailed: Wy koene gjin ferbining meitsje mei NorthStar. Kontrolearje dat it is opladen en tichtby, en besykje dan nochris.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Hâld NorthStar opladen en tichtby dizze telefoan, en scan dan nochris.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Sykje nei NorthStar apparaten yn de buert...

home.subtitle: Dashboard foar feiligensbegelieder
home.readyBody: Stim, kaart, sieraden en hoeders binne ien kraan fuort.

map.title: Feiligenskaart
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go foarbyld; Mapbox jout yn in ûntwikkelingsbou.
map.updateFailed: Wy koene jo lokaasje net bywurkje. Besykje it nochris.
map.notRequested: Lokaasjetagong waard net frege. Jo kinne it letter ynskeakelje fan Ynstellings.
map.permissionOff: Lokaasjetagong is út. Aktivearje it yn Ynstellings om de feiligenskaart op jo te sintrum.
map.timeout: Jo lokaasje duorret langer dan ferwachte. Ferpleats earne mei in dúdliker sinjaal en besykje it nochris.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Fertroude plakken dy't jo bewarje sille hjir ferskine foar rappe tagong.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Feilich ferbining meitsje mei jo stimbegelieder ...

messagesWaiting.one: %{count} berjocht dat wachtet om te ferstjoeren

safetyCall.reconnect: Op 'e nij ferbine mei stim AI
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Begjin de oprop of typ in berjocht as jo klear binne.

chat.retryAccessibility: Besykje it berjocht opnij te ferstjoeren

history.clearMessage: Dit ferwideret bewarre AI begeliedende berjochten fan dit apparaat.
history.cannotUndo: Dit kin net ûngedien makke wurde.
history.title: Konversaasjeskiednis
history.subtitle: AI begeliedende berjochten bewarre op dit apparaat.
history.emptyMessage: Jo AI begelieder petearen sille hjir ferskine nei jo earste oprop.
history.loadFailed: Wy koene de konversaasjeskiednis net laden. Besykje it nochris.
history.clearFailed: Wy koene de konversaasjeskiednis net wiskje. Besykje it nochris.
history.deleteFailed: Wy koene dat petear net wiskje. Besykje it nochris.

voices.title: Myn feiligensopropstimmen
voices.subtitle: Kies de begelieder stim dy't goed fielt om te hearren.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Besykje asjebleaft de stim nochris te kiezen.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Dit stimfoarbyld koe net spile wurde. Besykje it nochris.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Gebrûk bondele begelieder-antwurden as it netwurk of Hume bewiisbrieven net beskikber binne.
settings.privacyBody: Eksportearje of wiskje de lokale gegevens opslein op dit apparaat.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Kin jo gegevens no net eksportearje.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Dit ferwideret jo profyl, ynstellings, needkontakten, konversaasjeskiednis, tastimmingherinneringen en lokale autentyksesje fan dit apparaat.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Kin lokale gegevens op it stuit net wiskje.
settings.updateFailedMessage: Wy koene dy foarkar net bewarje. Besykje it nochris.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Jo sesje is noch aktyf. Besykje it nochris.

contacts.title: Emergency kontakten
contacts.subtitle: Fertroude minsken beskikber tidens feiligensstreamen.
contacts.name: Namme
contacts.emptyMessage: Foegje immen ta dy't jo fertrouwe, sadat se klear binne as in feiligensstream se nedich is.
contacts.removeMessage: Dizze persoan sil net mear ferskine yn jo needstream.
contacts.nameRequired: Fier de namme fan it kontakt yn.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Wy koene dit kontakt net bewarje. Kontrolearje de details en besykje it nochris.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Wy koene dit kontakt net fuortsmite. Besykje it nochris.

friends.title: Freonen
friends.subtitle: Guardians, oanfragen en needgrafyk.
friends.emptyMessage: Fertroude freonen en fersoargers sille hjir ferskine as se binne tafoege.

emergency.title: Emergency SOS
emergency.subtitle: Eskalearje allinich as jo direkte stipe nedich binne.
emergency.body: Dit sil jo feiligensstream ynformearje en needkontakten tariede.
emergency.addContact: Foegje in needkontakt ta yn Ynstellings.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Stub foar dielen fan lokaasje is klear. Ferbine it einpunt fan dielde backend om live keppelings te ferstjoeren.

quickShare.title: Fluch dielen
quickShare.subtitle: De stream fan lokaasjediel is klear.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tap
capybearTap.subtitle: Tik dûbel op jo NorthStar om in feilichheidsoranje te fallen.

errors.voiceOffline: Jo lykje offline. Jo berjocht sil ferstjoerd wurde as jo opnij ferbine.
errors.voiceQueued: Berjocht bewarre. It sil stjoerd wurde as de stimbegelieder opnij ferbynt.
errors.voiceRetrying: Besykje jo berjocht nochris te ferstjoeren...
errors.voiceConnecting: Feilich ferbining meitsje mei jo stimbegelieder ...
errors.microphone: Mikrofoantagong is nedich foar stimoproppen. Jo kinne it ynskeakelje yn Ynstellings, of typ in berjocht ynstee.
errors.billing: De online stimbegelieder is tydlik net beskikber. Jo kinne trochgean mei de offline begelieder.
errors.authentication: De stimbegelieder koe dizze sesje net ferifiearje. Meld jo opnij oan of brûk de offline begelieder foar no.
errors.timeout: De stimbegelieder duorre te lang om te reagearjen. Kontrolearje jo ferbining en besykje it nochris.
errors.network: Wy koene de stimbegelieder net berikke. Kontrolearje jo ferbining, besykje dan nochris of gean offline.
errors.genericVoice: Iets ûnderbriek de stimoprop. Besykje it nochris, of gean troch mei de offline begelieder.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving hat mikrofoantagong nedich foar feiligens en AI begeliedersoproppen.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving brûkt jo lokaasje foar de feiligenskaart en feiligensfunksjes yn 'e buert.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving brûkt Bluetooth om te ferbinen mei jo NorthStar feiligenssieraden.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Dizze oanmeldopsje is net beskikber yn dizze ferzje.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: De demomodus brûkt allinnich lokale testgegevens. Ferbûne tsjinsten binne net ferifiearre en dizze sesje wurdt weromset as de app opnij laden wurdt.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: De ferifikaasjekoade is ûnjildich of ferrûn. Freegje in nije koade oan en besykje it opnij.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Tefolle oanmeldbesykjen. Wachtsje efkes en besykje it dan opnij.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: De ferifikaasje fan it oanmelden duorre te lang. Kontrolearje jo ferbining en besykje it opnij.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Wy koene de oanmeldtsjinst net berikke. Kontrolearje jo ferbining en besykje it opnij.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Jo sesje is ferrûn. Meld jo opnij oan.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: De feilichheidskaart koe net laden wurde. Kontrolearje jo ferbining en besykje it opnij.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: De live lokaasje is net beskikber. Jo lêst bewarre lokaasje fan %{capturedAt} wurdt toand.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Wy koene jo lokaasje net diele. Kontrolearje de tagong ta jo lokaasje en besykje it opnij.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Hjir is myn lokaasje, registrearre op %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Hjir is myn lêst bewarre lokaasje, registrearre op %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Tagong ta Bluetooth stiet út. Skeakelje dit yn by Ynstellingen en besykje it opnij.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth stiet út. Skeakelje it yn en besykje it opnij.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Koppeljen fia Bluetooth is net beskikber op dit apparaat of yn dizze ferzje.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Wy koene NorthStar net fine. Hâld it tichtby, kontrolearje Bluetooth en besykje it opnij.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Der binne gjin NorthStar-apparaten yn de buert fûn. Hâld it tichtby en sykje opnij.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Wy koene gjin ferbining meitsje mei NorthStar. Hâld it opladen en tichtby en besykje it opnij.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Wy koene dit plak net bewarje. Besykje it opnij.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Der wie gjin needkontakt beskikber; der is net belle.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: De tillefoankiezer koe net iepene wurde; der is net belle.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: It lêste SOS-besykjen koe net befêstige wurde.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: De stimassistint is no net beskikber. Besykje it letter opnij of gean troch mei de offline-assistint.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
